productDisplayName: Peter England Unisex Black & Green Hiking Backpack
description: Style Notepeter england presents a wide range of efficient, everyday travel gear combined with impressive style. This hiking bag is a carrier of purpose. The bag comes with attractive and smartly designed compartments and pouches to suit the outdoors and is also sleek and stylish. So saddle up and have a hiking trip of a lifetime!Product DetailsOne main zipped compartment with an insert pocket, click clasps and an adjustable toggle strapClick clasps on the sidesWaist band with click clasps and one mesh zipped pocket on the waistbandWide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying at ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMesh back for ventilationBranding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustWarranty: 6 monthsSizeHeight: 64 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 15 cm
